title: HSK2 Level Final Quiz
description: Comprehensive assessment covering all vocabulary, grammar, and sentence patterns from HSK2 Lessons 1-15

questions.question: 我每天七点___。(I get up at 7 every day)
questions.question_pinyin: Wǒ měi tiān qī diǎn ___.

questions.question: Which sentence means 'I brush my teeth every morning'?
option_pinyin: Wǒ měi tiān zǎoshang shuā yá.
Wǒ měi tiān zǎoshang xǐ liǎn.
Wǒ měi tiān zǎoshang shuì jiào.
Wǒ měi tiān zǎoshang chī fàn.
questions.correct_pinyin: Wǒ měi tiān zǎoshang shuā yá.

questions.question: What does 先…然后… mean?
今天天气怎么样？
questions.question_pinyin: Jīntiān tiānqì zěnme yàng?
questions.correct: What is the weather like today?
options: What is the weather like today?

questions.question: 冬天很___，要多穿衣服。(Winter is very cold, wear more clothes)
questions.question_pinyin: Dōngtiān hěn ___, yào duō chuān yīfu.

questions.question: Which sentence correctly uses 比?
这件衣服太___了！便宜一点，可以吗？
questions.question_pinyin: Zhè jiàn yīfu tài ___ le! Piányí yīdiǎn, kěyǐ ma?

questions.question: 这双鞋多少钱？
questions.question_pinyin: Zhè shuāng xié duōshao qián?
questions.correct: How much do these shoes cost?
options: Where can I buy these shoes?
How many shoes do you have?
How much do these shoes cost?

questions.question: Use 多少 or 几: How do you ask 'How many people?(less than 10)'
去机场坐___最方便。(Taking the subway to the airport is most convenient)
questions.question_pinyin: Qù jīchǎng zuò ___ zuì fāngbiàn.

questions.question: 银行在哪里？往___走，然后左转。(Go straight, then turn left)
questions.question_pinyin: Yínháng zài nǎlǐ? Wǎng ___ zǒu, ránhòu zuǒ zhuǎn.

questions.question: 从这里走路要___分钟。How do you complete this sentence? (It takes 10 minutes to walk from here)
option_pinyin: Cóng zhèlǐ yào zǒulù shí fēnzhōng.
Zhèlǐ cóng zǒulù yào shí fēnzhōng.
Cóng zhèlǐ zǒulù yào shí fēnzhōng.
Zǒulù cóng zhèlǐ shí fēnzhōng yào.
questions.correct_pinyin: Cóng zhèlǐ zǒulù yào shí fēnzhōng.

questions.question: 我___了，需要去看医生。(I got sick and need to see a doctor)
questions.question_pinyin: Wǒ ___ le, xūyào qù kàn yīshēng.

questions.question: 你哪里不舒服？ What is the doctor asking?
questions.correct: Where does it hurt / What's wrong with you?
options: Where does it hurt / What's wrong with you?

questions.question: 我肚子___疼。(My stomach hurts a little)
questions.question_pinyin: Wǒ dùzi ___ téng.

questions.question: 你好！___ ！我要点菜。(Waiter! I'd like to order)
questions.question_pinyin: Nǐ hǎo ___! Wǒ yào diǎn cài.

questions.question: 这个菜又___又辣，我很喜欢！(This dish is both fragrant and spicy)
questions.question_pinyin: Zhège cài yòu ___ yòu là, wǒ hěn xǐhuān!

questions.question: 我___吃米饭，___吃面条。(I want to eat rice, not noodles)
questions.question_pinyin: Wǒ ___ chī mǐfàn, ___ chī miàntiáo.

questions.question: 今天是几月几号，___几？(What's today's date and day?)
questions.question_pinyin: Jīntiān shì jǐ yuè jǐ hào, xīngqī jǐ?

questions.question: 下班以后，我们___去吃饭。(After work, let's eat together)
questions.question_pinyin: Xià bān yǐhòu, wǒmen ___ qù chī fàn.

questions.question: What does 刚才 mean?
他的___是游泳和听音乐。(His hobbies are swimming and listening to music)
questions.question_pinyin: Tā de ___ shì yóuyǒng hé tīng yīnyuè.

questions.question: 周末你喜欢做什么？
questions.question_pinyin: Zhōumò nǐ xǐhuān zuò shénme?
questions.correct: What do you like to do on weekends?
options: What do you do at work?
Where do you go on weekdays?
What do you like to do on weekends?
When do you go to school?

questions.question: 这部电影___，我们一起去看吧！(This movie is interesting, let's watch it together!)
questions.question_pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng ___, wǒmen yīqǐ qù kàn ba!

questions.question: 考试很难，你___多复习。(The exam is hard, you should study more)
questions.question_pinyin: Kǎoshì hěn nán, nǐ ___ duō fùxí.

questions.question: 她的中文___好了。(Her Chinese is getting better and better)
questions.question_pinyin: Tā de Zhōngwén ___ hǎo le.

questions.question: 先做___，然后再去玩。(First finish homework, then go play)
questions.question_pinyin: Xiān zuò ___, ránhòu zài qù wán.

questions.question: 他___父母住在一起。(He lives together with his parents)
questions.question_pinyin: Tā ___ fùmǔ zhù zài yīqǐ.

questions.question: 他们___结婚了。(They got married last year)
questions.question_pinyin: Tāmen ___ jiéhūn le.

questions.question: What does 对…很好 mean?
questions.correct: To be very good/kind to someone
options: To be very good/kind to someone

questions.question: 别___！这没什么可怕的。(Don't be afraid! There's nothing to be scared of)
questions.question_pinyin: Bié ___! Zhè méi shénme kěpà de.

questions.question: 我希望___。Which completes this sentence correctly?
option_pinyin: Wǒ míngtiān xīwàng tiānqì le hǎo.

questions.question: 妈妈___我早点回家。(Mom lets/wants me to come home early)
questions.question_pinyin: Māma ___ wǒ zǎo diǎn huí jiā.

questions.question: 今天___开会，不能出去。(There's a meeting today, can't go out)
questions.question_pinyin: Jīntiān ___ kāi huì, bù néng chūqù.

questions.question: ___他很努力，___没有成功。(Although he tried hard, he didn't succeed)
questions.question_pinyin: ___ tā hěn nǔlì, ___ méiyǒu chénggōng.

questions.question: 他___我___这道题。(He helped me solve this problem)
questions.question_pinyin: Tā ___ wǒ ___ zhè dào tí.

questions.question: 他___去中国旅游。(He plans to travel to China)
questions.question_pinyin: Tā ___ qù Zhōngguó lǚyóu.

questions.question: 出发前，要记得带___。(Before leaving, remember to bring your passport)
questions.question_pinyin: Chūfā qián, yào jìde dài ___.

questions.question: 我一到北京，___去长城。(As soon as I arrived in Beijing, I went to the Great Wall)
questions.question_pinyin: Wǒ yí dào Běijīng, ___ qù Chángchéng.

questions.question: 我们应该___环境。(We should protect the environment)
questions.question_pinyin: Wǒmen yīnggāi ___ huánjìng.

questions.question: ___天气好，我们就去爬山。(If the weather is good, we'll go hiking)
questions.question_pinyin: ___ tiānqì hǎo, wǒmen jiù qù pá shān.

questions.question: 这只小狗___可爱！Which word best fills the blank for emphasis?
questions.question_pinyin: Zhè zhī xiǎo gǒu ___ kě'ài!

questions.question: 春节是中国最重要的___。(Spring Festival is China's most important holiday)
questions.question_pinyin: Chūnjié shì Zhōngguó zuì zhòngyào de ___.

questions.question: 他___聪明，___很努力。(He is not only smart but also very hardworking)
questions.question_pinyin: Tā ___ cōngming, ___ hěn nǔlì.

questions.question: ___你新年快乐！(Wishing you a Happy New Year!)
questions.question_pinyin: ___ nǐ xīnnián kuàilè!
